channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Ukraine seeks drone deals amid rising tensions, while African nations face oil supply disruptions and various legal and political issues unfold globally.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: US markets experienced significant declines amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, while rising energy costs impact various sectors and consumer services.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Anthropic temporarily blocked a Pentagon ban while Apple discontinues the Mac Pro and introduces new AI features for Siri.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Purdue advances to the Elite 8 in March Madness, while MLB Opening Day features record strikeouts and notable player performances.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries highlight the intelligence of animals, the complexities of sleep, and advancements in understanding diseases and potential extraterrestrial life.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-25
item.description: Meta and YouTube have been found liable in a significant social media addiction trial, potentially affecting numerous similar cases in the US.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-25
item.description: Global stock markets rose on optimism over a potential Iran peace plan, while concerns about fuel shortages and rising costs persist.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-25
item.description: Intel and LG Display may have achieved the best laptop battery life, surpassing competitors like Apple and Qualcomm.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-25
item.description: The Boston Celtics ended the Oklahoma City Thunder's 12-game winning streak, while various controversies and predictions shape the sports landscape.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-25
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include new insights into diabetes treatment, the search for extraterrestrial life, and the behavior of pollinators and memory storage in the brain.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-24
item.description: High oil prices could lead to a global recession, while geopolitical tensions and local political shifts are impacting various regions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-24
item.description: TSA workers face uncertainty amid a government shutdown, while Delta Airlines suspends special services for Congress members as funding battles continue.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-24
item.description: Meta faces a $375 million penalty for misleading users about product safety, while Apple and NASA announce significant updates and plans for their technologies.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-24
item.description: Hubert Davis was fired as UNC's basketball coach following an early NCAA tournament exit, while other sports news includes significant player contracts and rule changes.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-24
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include advancements in insulin delivery, memory storage, and the behavior of honey bees, alongside significant findings in astronomy and paleontology.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-23
item.description: Diplomatic efforts by the US president coincide with significant global events, including a military plane crash in Colombia and a terrorist attack in Ukraine.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-23
item.description: Stock markets reacted to geopolitical tensions as oil prices fell following Trump's postponement of strikes on Iran, while the IEA warns of a significant energy crisis.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-23
item.description: The US government has banned foreign-made consumer routers, while Nvidia's CEO claims the company has achieved artificial general intelligence.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-23
item.description: The NCAA Women's March Madness Sweet 16 features a strong showing from SEC and ACC teams, while MLB and NBA teams make significant roster moves.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-23
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include breakthroughs in weight loss for postmenopausal women, insights into food's environmental impact, and advancements in quantum technology and Alzheimer’s research.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-22
item.description: Escalating conflicts in the Middle East and climate warnings from the UN dominate global news, alongside significant political developments in France and ongoing crises in Cuba and Sudan.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-22
item.description: The ongoing Iran war is causing significant economic concerns, including rising oil prices, stock market dips, and increased interest in electric vehicles.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-22
item.description: AI continues to influence various sectors, from awards for AI personalities to the integration of AI in gaming and art.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-22
item.description: The NCAA tournament progresses with significant upsets and standout performances as teams advance to the Sweet 16 in both men's and women's competitions.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-22
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include the oldest known cave art, a new type of time crystal, and advancements in quantum batteries and cancer prediction.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-21
item.description: Iranian military actions escalate tensions in the region, while Cuba faces severe power outages amid a US blockade.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-21
item.description: US interest in electric vehicles rises amid soaring gas prices, while stock markets continue to decline due to geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-21
item.description: A lawsuit involving Halide's co-founder and Apple highlights ongoing tensions in tech partnerships, while various tech products see significant discounts amid sales events.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-21
item.description: March Madness continues with thrilling second-round games, while Luka Doncic faces a potential suspension and Kevin Durant climbs the NBA scoring list.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-21
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include a new species of fast-running crocodile, advancements in cancer prediction AI, and the revelation of hidden freshwater reservoirs under the Great Salt Lake.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-20
item.description: Iranian strikes caused significant damage to US bases, while the US lifted sanctions on Iranian oil amid rising gas prices.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-20
item.description: US stock markets continued to decline amid concerns over the US-Israel war on Iran, while CBS News announced significant layoffs affecting its radio division.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-20
item.description: A California jury ruled that Elon Musk's misleading tweets caused losses for Twitter investors, while Microsoft announced significant updates to Windows 11.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-20
item.description: March Madness continues with significant matchups and developments, including NCAA lawsuits and player injuries.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-20
item.description: Recent scientific studies reveal new insights into hearing, strength training, climate history, genetic health risks, and innovative technologies for sustainability.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-19
item.description: Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu stated that the country acted independently in a recent attack on an Iranian gas field, amidst rising tensions in the region.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-19
item.description: Oil and gas prices surged following attacks on facilities in the Middle East, while the US Federal Reserve is expected to lower capital requirements for major banks.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-19
item.description: Valve's SteamOS 3.8 update introduces significant features, while OpenAI plans a desktop superapp to consolidate its offerings.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-19
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 60 points as the Lakers extended their winning streak to eight games, while NCAA tournament upsets marked the opening rounds.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-19
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from new strength training guidelines to groundbreaking findings in particle physics and cancer genetics.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-18
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran has escalated tensions, with significant military actions and political implications affecting global markets and regional stability.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-18
item.description: The Federal Reserve maintains interest rates amid inflation concerns driven by the Iran war, while Trump seeks to lower oil prices through regulatory changes.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-18
item.description: The FBI's acquisition of location data without warrants raises privacy concerns, while Amazon defends its USPS contract amid financial struggles.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-18
item.description: Miami (Ohio) and Prairie View A&M secured historic NCAA tournament victories, while the NFL considers a significant rule change for draft pick trades.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-18
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include a hidden granite mass in Antarctica, insights into feathered dinosaurs, and a new exoplanet with unusual sulfur-rich gases.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-17
item.description: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-17
item.description: Oil and gas prices rise again after Iran attacks production facilities.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-17
item.description: I went to the Pentagon to watch Pete Hegseth scold war reporters.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-17
item.description: WBC champs! Takeaways as Venezuela stuns Team USA.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-17
item.description: JWST reveals a strange sulfur world unlike any planet we know.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-16
item.description: Global tensions rise as Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of a deadly hospital strike, while civil unrest escalates in South Sudan and Cuba faces a power grid collapse.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-16
item.description: US oil prices are expected to fluctuate significantly as the Iran war continues, impacting affordability for Americans amid rising living costs.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-16
item.description: Nvidia unveiled DLSS 5, a generative AI graphics technology, while legal challenges arise for xAI and OpenAI regarding AI-generated content.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-16
item.description: Venezuela advances to its first World Baseball Classic final, while the NCAA tournament excitement builds with bracket predictions and team preparations.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-16
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal insights into ancient mummification, cancer treatment advancements, and the potential for life on Mars, among other significant findings.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-15
item.description: Severe flooding in Kenya has resulted in 66 deaths, while global tensions continue with protests in Cuba and ongoing conflicts in Ukraine and the Middle East.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-15
item.description: Rising oil prices and affordability issues dominate U.S. economic concerns amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and domestic challenges.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-15
item.description: Aether OS introduces a browser-based desktop experience, while Meta plans significant layoffs amid rising costs in AI and data centers.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-15
item.description: The NCAA tournament brackets for both men's and women's basketball have been revealed, while Team USA advances to the WBC final after defeating the Dominican Republic.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-15
item.description: Astronomers have identified the source of the brightest fast radio burst ever, while new findings reveal hidden water on Mars that could have supported ancient life.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-14
item.description: The global situation remains tense with escalating conflicts in the Middle East and civil unrest in Cuba amid worsening economic conditions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-14
item.description: Americans are facing rising costs of living and soaring gas prices, raising concerns about economic management amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-14
item.description: Meta plans to lay off up to 20 percent of its workforce as it reallocates funds towards AI and data centers.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-14
item.description: Duke, Arizona, and St. John's secured conference titles, while Venezuela stunned Japan in the World Baseball Classic quarterfinals.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-14
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries highlight the importance of ecosystem health, advancements in disease research, and new insights into planetary and biological processes.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-13
item.description: The US is increasing military presence in the Middle East amid ongoing regional tensions, while Ukraine expresses concerns over potential easing of Russian sanctions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-13
item.description: A significant majority of Americans report financial strain due to Trump tariffs, while rising gas prices and geopolitical tensions exacerbate economic concerns.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-13
item.description: The technology sector sees significant developments with ongoing legal battles, new product features, and company settlements impacting various platforms and services.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-13
item.description: The WNBA faces urgency to finalize a new CBA by Monday, while the U.S. advances in the World Baseball Classic and NCAA tournaments heat up.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-13
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from the potential for farming on the Moon to the impact of microplastics on brain health.
